case_title: LUNA, RENE vs. WOOD, DAVID DBA DAVID WOOD INTERIORS & EXTERIORS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUNA, RENE AS TO DEFENDANT WOOD, DAVID DBA DAVID WOOD INTERIORS & EXTERIORS
